title: Forêts spirituelles et jardins d'enfants forestiers
subtitle: Résultats de l'étude de cas n° 7
description: A case study of a market-based business model in Switzerland that establishes funeral forest sites where individuals can bury cremated ashes near designated trees, aiming to enhance cultural ecosystem services. The initiative demonstrates how forest owners can generate revenue through long-term conservation contracts while offering spiritual and recreational value to users.
